tagline: Intakes, checks eligibility and prepares petitions — a licensed immigration attorney of record signs before filing.
problem: Immigration filing is high-volume eligibility analysis + form preparation where giving legal advice or appearing as the representative of record is the unauthorized practice of law, and a false statement carries 18 USC 1546 / INA 274C fraud liability.
outcome: Petitions intaked, eligibility-checked and prepared straight-through; the licensed attorney of record (G-28) signs before the petition is filed with USCIS.

steps.does: Intake the applicant documents (passport, I-94, supporting evidence)
Check visa/benefit eligibility, priority date (DOS Visa Bulletin) and RFE risk
Prepare the petition forms and evidence index (no legal advice issued)
A licensed immigration attorney of record (G-28) signs the petition
Track the receipt, monitor status and surface any RFE
